chunks.text: Deep in the drawer of my father's desk, I discover an old diary.
He seems to have been writing for a long time.
For a moment I held my breath.
Reading would mean revealing the inside of my father's heart.
But I could not avoid the temptation.
I picked it up and began remembering each line with my eyes.
In his youth, my father had been composing poetry.
In every word, there was a feeling of enjoying life
but also a small regret at the bottom of his chest.
My father is always quiet and says little.
But inside that diary, another father existed.
Preserving my father's past filled me with a small respect.
